markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Tomas Martinez wins the Martinez vs Alvarado professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Quito Qualification Round 1 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Martinez vs Alvarado professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Quito Qualification Round 1 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jesús Luzardo has 18+ outs recorded in the Philadelphia vs New York M professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 1:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Jesús Luzardo is scratched or is not a starting pitcher, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jesús Luzardo is not a starting pitcher but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, relief appearances will not count towards this market.
If Jesús Luzardo is a starting pitcher and records at least one pitch the market will settle based on outs recorded.
markets.title: Jesús Luzardo: 18+ Outs Recorded?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.

Player Participation & Settlement Criteria

If Byron Buxton is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Byron Buxton is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Byron Buxton: 4+ hits?
